mano_cua.result_summary: 无法完成国际化测试。两个问题叠加：1) 语言切换按钮点击后 crash（Cannot read properties of undefined reading percent），导致无法正常切换语言；2) Services 页面后端返回 500（无 APISIX 后端），无法看到空状态提示。尝试通过 localStorage 设置 i18nextLng:zh 绕过，但侧边栏仍显示英文。标记为 backend_risk 任务，纯前端无法测试目标功能。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Language switcher button crashes app with 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading percent)'. Services page returns 500 (no APISIX backend). Tried localStorage workaround but sidebar stays English. Cannot test i18n empty state as designed.
